extensionDescription.message: Save YouTube videos instantly—no menus, no extra clicks. The YouTube button you needed.

donate.description: British English commonly uses 'Support' instead of 'Donate'

issues.description: Issues link text - more formal for British English

help.description: Help link text - British spelling of 'Center'

wlButtonDefaultTitle.description: Default tooltip/aria label for the Watch Later button

wlButtonDeleteTitle.description: Tooltip/aria label when clicking again will remove from Watch Later

welcomeMessage.message: Thank you for installing! Watch Later Button adds a dedicated button directly on YouTube videos and thumbnails so you can save videos in one click.

welcomeStep2.message: 2. Hover over a thumbnail or open a video player

welcomeStep3.message: 3. Click the red button to instantly save (with a 10-second undo countdown)

updateVersionMessage.message: Watch Later Button has been successfully updated to version

updateFeature1.message: Onboarding & Update pages: Localized welcome and update pages inside the extension.

updateFeature2.message: YouTube layout stability: Improved resilience for dynamic YouTube SPA updates.

updateFeature3.message: Smooth transitions: Refined button hover rotations and conic-gradient countdown animations.
